title: Title the EV-charging slide
guidance: Reward a title that states the takeaway as a claim and reads like an MBB action title. Penalise topic labels or anything unsupported by the body.

runner_input.instruction: Write the slide title as the takeaway of the body below.
runner_input.constraints: Output: a single title line only. No body, no bullets, no colon-subtitle.

items: Commercial charging install + maintenance; ~£1.4bn annual market by 2030
Drivers: 2035 ICE-sales ban, fleet-electrification mandates, workplace-charging grants
Installer base highly fragmented; top 10 hold <20% share
Bottleneck: grid-connection lead times of 9–18 months cap near-term volume
Hardware commoditising; value shifting to software + maintenance contracts

rubric_notes: Could assert big market, but grid connection gates the timing.
